name: notaday
title: Notaday
description: Raycast Extension for the productivity app Notaday
author: alexander_sattler

commands.name: create-entry
commands.title: Create Entry
commands.description: Create a new Notaday task or routine

commands.name: manage-tags
commands.title: Manage Tags
commands.description: Create, edit, and delete Notaday tags

commands.name: manage-channels
commands.title: Manage Channels
commands.description: Create, edit, and delete Notaday channels

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your Notaday API token. It is sent as a Bearer token when requesting data from the Notaday API.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
